expectations.text: uses_chartjs: Does the HTML use Chart.js (not CSS-only bars)?
expectations.evidence: chart.js@4.4.0 loaded via CDN; `new Chart(ctx, { type: 'bar', ... })` instantiated in script

expectations.text: all_six_months: Are all 6 months (1〜6月) present in the chart data?
has_pptx_export: Is there a PPTX export button or function?
expectations.evidence: pptxgenjs@3.12.0 loaded; `initPPTXExport({ filename: '月別売上推移.pptx', ... })` called in animation.onComplete

expectations.text: animation_pptx_timing: Is initPPTXExport or canvas.toDataURL called inside animation.onComplete?
expectations.evidence: animation: { onComplete: () => { const chartImg = document.getElementById('bar-chart').toDataURL('image/png'); initPPTXExport({...}) } }

expectations.text: before_after_structure: Is there a clear Before/After visual structure?
expectations.evidence: 3-column grid with `.col-panel.before` (red border), center arrow column, and `.col-panel.after` (green border)

expectations.text: all_three_kpis: Are 処理時間, エラー率, 月間コスト all present?
expectations.evidence: 処理時間 (4時間→20分), エラー率 (12%→1.5%), 月間コスト (80万円→35万円) in both before/after panels and stat-bar footer

expectations.text: big_number_emphasis: Are numbers displayed in large/bold/colored text?
expectations.evidence: `.kpi-row-value { font-size: 52px; font-weight: 900 }` with red (#F87171) for before and green (#10B981) for after

expectations.text: has_pptx_export: Is PPTX export implemented?
expectations.evidence: `<button class='export-btn' onclick='exportPPTX()'>PPTX に書き出す</button>`; html2canvas + pptxgenjs@3.12.0 loaded; full `exportPPTX()` async function implemented

expectations.text: own_company_highlighted: Is the 自社 column visually differentiated?
expectations.evidence: `.price-card.highlight` has accent border (var(--accent)) and accent-bg background with '推奨' badge; `thead th.th-highlight` has accent background; `td.cell-highlight` has accent-bg with accent-colored bold text

expectations.text: all_four_items: Are 価格, API連携, 日本語対応, サポート all present?
expectations.evidence: Table rows: '月額価格', 'API 連携', '日本語対応', 'サポート体制' all present as tbody td:first-child row labels

expectations.text: correct_values: Are the prices (¥5,000/¥8,000/¥3,500) and symbols correct?
expectations.evidence: 自社: ¥5,000 with ◎ (日本語), ○ (API), 24時間対応 (サポート); A社: ¥8,000 with △ (日本語), ○ (API); B社: ¥3,500 with ○ (日本語), ✕ (API)

expectations.text: has_pptx_export: Is PPTX export implemented?
expectations.evidence: `<button class='export-btn' id='exportBtn'>↓ PPTX 書き出し</button>`; pptxgenjs@3.12.0 + html2canvas@1.4.1 loaded; full async export function with 2-slide generation

expectations.text: uses_chartjs: Does the HTML use Chart.js (not CSS-only bars)?
expectations.evidence: No Chart.js script included; bars are CSS-only div elements with `transform: scaleY()` animation

expectations.text: all_six_months: Are all 6 months (1〜6月) present in the chart data?
expectations.evidence: data array contains { month: '1月' } through { month: '6月' } with values 120, 150, 90, 180, 210, 170

expectations.text: has_pptx_export: Is there a PPTX export button or function?
expectations.evidence: No pptxgenjs library loaded and no export button or function present anywhere in the HTML

expectations.text: animation_pptx_timing: Is initPPTXExport or canvas.toDataURL called inside animation.onComplete?
expectations.evidence: No Chart.js animation.onComplete, no canvas.toDataURL, no initPPTXExport anywhere in the file

expectations.text: before_after_structure: Is there a clear Before/After visual structure?
expectations.evidence: `.columns` grid with `col-header before` / `col-header after` panels separated by center arrow column with reduction percentages

expectations.text: all_three_kpis: Are 処理時間, エラー率, 月間コスト all present?
expectations.evidence: 処理時間 (4時間→20分), エラー率 (12%→1.5%), 月間コスト (80万円→35万円) present in both before/after sections and summary cards

expectations.text: big_number_emphasis: Are numbers displayed in large/bold/colored text?
expectations.evidence: `.kpi-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800 }` with `.before-section .kpi-value { color: #ff7b72 }` and `.after-section .kpi-value { color: #56d364 }`; summary-change at 36px font-weight:900

expectations.text: has_pptx_export: Is PPTX export implemented?
expectations.evidence: No pptxgenjs library, no html2canvas library, no export button, and no export function anywhere in the file

expectations.text: own_company_highlighted: Is the 自社 column visually differentiated?
expectations.evidence: `.col-header.ours` has blue gradient background, `border-top: 3px solid #58a6ff`, and 'RECOMMENDED' badge; `.cell.ours` has gradient background and larger bold text

expectations.text: all_four_items: Are 価格, API連携, 日本語対応, サポート all present?
expectations.evidence: Row labels: '価格', 'API連携', '日本語対応', 'サポート' all present as `.cell.row-label` elements

expectations.text: correct_values: Are the prices (¥5,000/¥8,000/¥3,500) and symbols correct?
expectations.evidence: 自社: ¥5,000 with ◎ (日本語), ○ (API連携), 24h/365日 (サポート); A社: ¥8,000 with △ (日本語), ○ (API); B社: ¥3,500 with ○ (日本語), ✕ (API)

expectations.text: has_pptx_export: Is PPTX export implemented?
expectations.evidence: No pptxgenjs library, no html2canvas library, no PPTX export button or function. Only a CTA '無料デモを申し込む' button is present
